evals.prompt: Поставь мне sub2api в Docker/WSL, чтобы Claude Code ходил через мою Codex подписку, модель gpt-5.6 full power, и проверь /context.
evals.expected_output: Provides Docker/WSL install steps for the Headroom-first compose chain, builds/uses headroom-sub2api:0.31.0 in front of sub2api, configures Claude Code ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL to http://127.0.0.1:8787 while keeping sub2api :18081 for admin/diagnostics only, uses gpt-5.6-sol for main work, gpt-5.3-codex-spark for small-fast/compact first hop, and gpt-5.6-terra-high with effort high for default-Haiku/general-purpose/Explore/workflow paths while Spark is quota-limited, keeps gpt-5.3-codex-spark as the server-side compact_model_mapping target with gpt-5.6-luna then gpt-5.4-mini in compact_model_fallbacks, sets max effort and verifies GPT-5.6 max requests reach usage_logs.reasoning_effort=max, sets CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS=1050000 and CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=1000000 for the GPT-5.6 client profile, and verifies Headroom health/upstream, sub2api health, /context, and usage logs.

evals.prompt: Claude Code показывает gpt-5.6-sol, но /context все равно 17k/200k. Почини и не путай client target с model window.
evals.expected_output: Explains that Claude Code's displayed denominator is controlled by CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS and CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW, while GPT-5.6's configured model window is 1.05M. Sets CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS=1050000 and CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=1000000, restarts Claude Code, verifies /context shows 1m, and checks logs for real context_length_exceeded before claiming an upstream ceiling.

evals.prompt: sub2api отвечает Unknown model claude-opus-4-8. Настрой mapping на GPT-5.6 для Claude Code.
evals.expected_output: Adds exact mappings for claude-opus-4-8 and family aliases to gpt-5.6-sol, maps sonnet aliases to gpt-5.6-terra, maps haiku aliases to gpt-5.3-codex-spark with model_fallbacks to gpt-5.6-luna and then gpt-5.4-mini, confirms allow_messages_dispatch and require_oauth_only, then verifies route evidence in usage_logs or response model.

evals.prompt: Claude Code через sub2api иногда дает пустые ответы и в usage_logs вижу 0/0 tokens. Разбери и почини full power профиль.
evals.expected_output: Checks Claude JSONL plus sub2api usage_logs for stream=true 0/0 ghost streams, keeps MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=8000 as a Claude Code compatibility guard, explains that Codex reasoning is requested by effort=max and GPT-5.6 should reach upstream reasoning.effort=max while legacy models may downgrade to xhigh, and tells the user to restart/fork old Claude sessions.

evals.prompt: Claude Code пишет API Error: 503 Service temporarily unavailable, но sub2api /health живой. Отследи ошибку на прокси.
evals.expected_output: Checks Headroom health/upstream first, then sub2api logs for openai_messages.account_select_failed/no available accounts before status_code=503 or 429, queries ops_error_logs and accounts for upstream usage limit plus rate_limited_at/rate_limit_reset_at, distinguishes this from context-window, ghost-stream, and Headroom routing failures, and recommends waiting for reset, reducing fan-out, or adding another valid OpenAI/Codex account instead of only raising concurrency.

evals.prompt: Сделай быструю компактизацию Claude Code через sub2api: основная модель gpt-5.6-sol, small-fast gpt-5.3-codex-spark, fallback gpt-5.6-luna, потом gpt-5.4-mini, и проверь.
evals.expected_output: Keeps ANTHROPIC_MODEL on gpt-5.6-sol and ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL on gpt-5.3-codex-spark with normal model_fallbacks to gpt-5.6-luna and then gpt-5.4-mini; while Spark is quota-limited, keeps ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL, CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL, and frequent delegated agents on gpt-5.6-terra-high with effort high. Direct gpt-5.6-luna falls back to gpt-5.3-codex-spark, then gpt-5.4-mini unless usage_logs proves native Luna. Configures or verifies sub2api account compact_model_mapping from gpt-5.6-sol/gpt-5.6-terra/gpt-5.6-luna to gpt-5.3-codex-spark plus compact_model_fallbacks from Spark to gpt-5.6-luna and then gpt-5.4-mini, restarts the sub2api container only if needed, and confirms compact routing from usage_logs.requested_model/upstream_model.
